title: Bday Reminder automation

posts.author: jiwooseok (Kevin Seok)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to set up a birthday reminder for my employees. what is the best automated way?
I have created a Bday reminder board. And when I click a button in an employee item, it creates an item in the birth day reminder board.

image1175×85 11.5 KB

Then this is what i get.
image1004×443 37.2 KB

It shows the employee’s bday with his birth year. I’m not sure if I can set up an automated bday reminder for this year and upcoming years without changing his birth year?
